positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic mountain range under a vibrant nebula sky. The foreground features abstract, geometric silhouettes of mountain peaks and crystal formations. The color palette should be deep indigo, brilliant magenta, teal, and glowing gold, creating a dramatic, high-contrast ethereal scene. The style is neo-psychedelic graphic design combined with modern botanical etchings, emphasizing clean lines and strong, readable contrast for apparel printing. Full bleed composition, centered focal point, perfect for repeating print patterns.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, messy, realistic photography, logo, copyright, faded
